variables.notes: R:nc. Candidate list clearly misses the important SG&A row 'Distribution costs', so selected it from the full preview. Manual review is needed because both 'Distribution costs', 'Administration costs', and 'Research and development costs' each appear more than once in the statement, and the preview does not uniquely distinguish the duplicate instances (some appear to include D&A while later duplicates appear to exclude D&A). Included R&D in XSGA per rule because it is separately reported above EBIT and should net out via XSGA-XRD. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Distribution costs
